label: Introduces a regression; reviewer requests changes and reports a blocker.

task.summary: Speed up event replay by memoizing the projector
acceptance_criteria: replayed run state is identical to the un-memoized projector
replay does not read events out of order

findings.message: The memoized projector keys on run id only, so a new event after the first replay is never observed and replayed state goes stale.
No test covers replay after appending an event to an already-replayed run.
